notes.description: Augments provide a small boost to familiars when equipped on that familiar's augment table. There are four types of augments, each of which can be obtained through different means: Bone: Xirtanium Skeletal Linings () Brain: Neurion Stimulators () Chip: Microprocessing Stabilizing () Pump: Radial...
